author: sungdark
title: Generic architectural analysis with fabricated code evidence
notes: Submission is a generic architectural critique, not a specific engineering flaw. Key code example (base/registry.py importing from intelligence.review.context_holistic) is fabricated — no such import exists. Claims 22 language plugins (actual: 28). Contains mixed Chinese text suggesting LLM-generated content. File line counts are mostly accurate but the analysis is surface-level and non-actionable. Not a valid bounty finding.
